verses.3: ‘Why have we fasted,’ they say, ‘and you don’t see?
verses.4: Behold, you fast for strife and contention,
verses.5: Is this the fast that I have chosen?
verses.6: “Isn’t this the fast that I have chosen:
verses.7: Isn’t it to distribute your bread to the hungry,
verses.8: Then your light will break out as the morning,
verses.9: Then you will call, and the LORD will answer.
verses.10: and if you pour out your soul to the hungry,
verses.11: and the LORD will guide you continually,
verses.12: Those who will be of you will build the old waste places.
verses.13: “If you turn away your foot from the Sabbath,
verses.14: then you will delight yourself in the LORD,
